name: Just Shut Up and Come with Us!!!!

issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 5 cards, (2) filtering for Animal type AND cost ≤3, (3) playing up to 1 card, (4) placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches by cost and lacks type filter, card limit (up to 1), and deck management for remaining cards.
Filter missing type constraint. Should filter for {Animal} type characters in addition to cost constraint.
Missing 'maxResults' or equivalent to enforce 'up to 1' card limit on play action.
Missing action to handle remaining cards (place at bottom of deck in any order). Current DSL only plays cards and doesn't manage non-selected cards.
